title: Pasania oligoneura
taxonomy: Pasania oligoneura is classified as a species of tree in the family Lauraceae. It is a part of the genus Pasania, which is a group of evergreen trees native to the tropical forests of Asia. The Lauraceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as laurels, that are found in various parts of the world. Members of the Lauraceae family are often characterized by their aromatic leaves and small, showy flowers. Pasania oligoneura is a specific species within this family, with its own unique characteristics and distribution.
